home.heroSubtitle: Authentic Georgian artisanal cheese, handcrafted in Ohio with premium local milk
home.featuredSubtitle: Each cheese is handcrafted using centuries-old Georgian techniques
home.heritageText: From the ancient land of Colchis to the heartland of Ohio, we bring you authentic Georgian cheese crafted with passion and heritage.

heritage.title: Our Heritage
heritage.subtitle: The Story of Colchis Creamery
heritage.intro: In the ancient land of Colchis, where the Golden Fleece was sought, a tradition of cheesemaking has flourished for millennia. We bring that tradition to Ohio.
heritage.traditionText: Georgia is one of the oldest cheesemaking regions in the world. For over 8,000 years, Georgian cheesemakers have perfected the art of crafting unique cheeses that are unlike anything found elsewhere.
heritage.ohioText: We source the finest local milk from Ohio's premium dairy farms, combining ancient Georgian techniques with modern food safety standards to create cheese that honors tradition while meeting the highest quality benchmarks.
heritage.processText: Every batch of Colchis Creamery cheese is handcrafted in small quantities, ensuring meticulous attention to detail. From stretching and brining to aging — each step follows time-honored methods.

wholesale.benefit2Text: Consistent production from our Ohio facility with flexible delivery schedules

wholesale.successText: Thank you for your interest. Our sales team will contact you within 2 business days.
